description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a dark metallic finish, complemented by a wooden or polymer fixed stock at the rear. The receiver and handguard are robust, with a prominent magazine well and a vertical foregrip beneath the barrel for improved handling. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined, and the rifle is equipped with basic iron sights for aiming. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger assembly. The overall design suggests a military or tactical application, with a utilitarian and functional aesthetic. The surface is mostly matte with some subtle gloss on the metal components, and the stock has a deep reddish-brown hue.
description: A long, dark rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, featuring a matte metal finish and a reddish-brown stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, barrel, magazine, and foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the stock, barrel, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the width of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
